Package simpaths.model.decisions

package simpaths.model.decisions
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    simpaths.model
     
    simpaths.model.enums
     
    simpaths.model.taxes
     
  • Class
    Description
    Axis
    Enumeration of accommodated state variables Variables are listed here in order of their inclusion in the model grid structure.
    BoundaryPoints
    CLASS TO EVALUATE AND STORE BOUNDARY POINTS OF LINEAR ORDINATE SEARCH CO-ORDINATES
    CESUtility
    CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF NESTED CES INTERTEMPORAL UTILITY FUNCTION
    CheckBoundary
    CHECK FOR MINIMUM AT BOUNDARY OF LINEAR SEARCH DOMAIN
    DecisionParams
    CLASS TO STORE FIXED PARAMETERS FOR INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION DECISIONS
    DecisionTests
     
    Expectations
    CLASS TO DEFINE STATE EXPECTATIONS FOR UTILITY MAXIMISATION
    ExpectationsFactory
    class to manage expansion of expectations to account for each successive state variable
    Grid
    CLASS TO STORE DATA FOR GRID ASSOCIATED WITH SINGLE OPTIMISATION VARIABLE
    Grids
    CLASS TO DEFINE GRIDS THAT STORE INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION SOLUTIONS MODULES OF THE CLASS FACILITATE INPUT AND EXTRACTION OF OPTIMISED DATA AS WELL AS DESCRIPTIVE DETAIL OF DATA THE GRIDS ARE DEFINED AS ONE-DIMENSIONAL VECTORS ELEMENTS OF EACH VECTOR ARE ORGANISED TO REFLECT IMPLICIT DIMENSIONAL AXES SEE DEFINITION OF THE AXES ATTRIBUTE FOR DETAILS
    GridScale
    CLASS TO DEFINE GRID AXES
    LocalExpectations
     
    ManagerFileGrids
    CLASS TO MANAGE INTERACTIONS BETWEEN THE IO GRIDS AND THE LOCAL FILE SYSTEM
    ManagerPopulateGrids
    CLASS TO MANAGE IDENTIFICATION OF LOOK-UP TABLE FOR INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION DECISIONS THE LOOK-UP TABLE IS REFERRED TO THROUGHOUT AS THE 'GRIDS'
    ManagerSolveGrids
    CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF SOLUTIONS TO POPULATE INTERTEMPORAL OPTIMISATION GRIDS THE SOLUTION PROCEDURE RUNS THROUGH ALL STATE COMBINATIONS DESCRIBED BY THE GRIDS VIA FOUR NESTED LOOPS THE FIRST (OUTER-MOST) LOOP CONSIDERS SLICES OF THE GRIDS DISTINGUISHED BY AGE THIS IS MOTIVATED BY THE USE OF BACKWARD INDUCTION TECHNIQUES BY THE SOLUTION METHOD THE SECOND LOOP CONSIDERS COMBINATIONS OF CHARACTERISTICS, FOR WHICH EXPECTATIONS ARE EXOGENOUS OF CONTROL VARIABLES THIS ALLOWS EVALUATIONS FOR EXPECTATIONS OVER THESE VARIABLES TO BE DONE ONCE FOR ALL COMBINATIONS OF STATES CONSIDERED IN THE INNER TWO LOOPS STATES IN THIS LOOP ARE IDENTIFIED BY AXES[aa][ii][4] = 0 OR 0.5 THE THIRD LOOP IS PARALLISED TO TAKE FULL ADVANTAGE OF COMPUTING RESOURCES THE FOURTH (INNER-MOST) LOOP IS SEPARATED FROM THE THIRD LOOP ONLY TO ECONOMISE THE OVER-HEAD ASSOCIATED WITH PARALLELISATIONS
    ManagerSolveState
    CLASS TO MANAGE EVALUATION OF NUMERICAL SOLUTIONS FOR SPECIFIC STATE COMBINATION MANAGER EVALUATES THE FEASIBLE DISCRETE CONTROLS, AND OBTAINS SOLUTIONS FOR ALL CONTINUOUS CONTROLS FOR EACH FEASIBLE COMBINATION OF DISCRETE CONTROLS.
    Minimiser
    CLASS TO EVALUATE FUNCTION MINIMISATIONS
    Quadrature
    OBJECT TO EVALUATE AND STORE ABSCISSAE AND WEIGHTS FOR GAUSS HERMITE QUADRATURE TOOL FOR APPROXIMATING EXPECTATIONS, OF STANDARD NORMAL DISTRIBUTION (MEAN 0, STDEV 1) BETWEEN -INF AND +INF CODE BASED ON Numerical Recipes, 1987, CHAPTER 4
    RankArray
    CLASS TO STORE METHODS FOR RANKING ARRAYS
    States
    CLASS TO DEFINE A GIVEN COMBINATION OF STATE VARIABLES
    UtilityMaximisation
    CLASS TO ENCAPSULATE SOLUTION TO UTILITY OPTIMISATION
    WriteGridsBean
    CLASS TO STORE GRID SOLUTIONS FOR WRITING TO CSV FILE
